citations.quote: 2 attachments (444 KB)\nTenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf; Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf;

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0066 email states it contains two embedded PDF attachments: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'.
The pdftotext extraction method used for NAP-SRC-0066 does not extract embedded attachment binary data. The attachments are not present as separate source files in the evidence manifest.

No tool configured for extracting embedded PDF attachments is available in the current tool registry. A follow-up task is needed to extract the attachments using a suitable tool (e.g., pdfdetach, Apache PDFBox, or manual extraction).

proposed_artifacts.content: The source NAP-SRC-0066 (Slateford Road Trimester 2 Full Flat Inspections email) references two embedded PDF attachments: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'. The initial pdftotext extraction did not capture these attachments. A follow-up task (T-B17-3-extract-attachments) is proposed to extract the embedded files using a suitable tool (e.g., pdfdetach, Apache PDFBox, or manual extraction).
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction Note for NAP-SRC-0066 Embedded Attachments

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract the two embedded PDF attachments ('Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf') from the source PDF NAP-SRC-0066 using pdfdetach or a similar tool. Save the extracted files as separate source documents in the matter's source directory and register them in the file inventory.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded attachments from NAP-SRC-0066 PDF using pdfdetach or similar tool

summary: NAP-SRC-0066 email references two embedded PDF attachments (Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf and Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf). The initial pdftotext extraction did not capture these attachments. No extraction tool is currently configured. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the attachments using pdfdetach or similar.

uncertainties.description: The embedded attachments have not been extracted; their content and relevance to the matter are unknown.
No tool for extracting embedded PDF attachments is currently available in the tool registry.
